name: semantic-search-codex
description: Repo-local Codex plugin with project context and skills for the SemanticSearch MantisBT plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-local Codex helpers for this MantisBT plugin.
interface.longDescription: Provides project context and reusable Codex skills for working on the SemanticSearch MantisBT plugin, its deployment helpers, and its vectorization workflow.
defaultPrompt: Trace the indexing flow across the plugin.
Compare repo code with a deployed plugin copy.
